chunks.title: Moses commands the offerings
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of the eighth day event and Moses' instructions to Aaron and the people.

chunks.title: Aaron offers his own sacrifices
chunks.reason: Detailed account of Aaron performing the sin and burnt offerings for himself.

chunks.title: Aaron offers the people's sacrifices
chunks.reason: Continuation of the ritual focusing on the peace offerings and grain offering for the congregation.

chunks.title: Blessing and divine fire
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the ceremony with Aaron's blessing, Moses and Aaron entering the tent, and God's fire consuming the offering.
